dialogue.speaker: Detective Kael
dialogue.visual_cue: Rain streaks down the wet pavement.

dialogue.speaker: Shadow Contact
dialogue.line: Because the corporation owns the rain.

scenes.action: Kael adjusts his cybernetic earpiece while stepping through puddles.

dialogue.speaker: Detective Kael
dialogue.line: I don't need protocol. I need truth.
dialogue.visual_cue: Kael hacks into the central console.

scenes.action: Kael uploads a virus code into the mainframe system.

dialogue.speaker: Detective Kael
dialogue.line: They thought they could control the city.

dialogue.speaker: Detective Kael
dialogue.visual_cue: Smoke clears from the burning drone.

scenes.action: Kael watches the lights of Neo-Tokyo fade into the distance.
